title: Robust Monitoring of Arc Welding Processes: A Generalizable Framework with DVAE and Particle Filter
authors: Yue Cao, Hai Lin, YuMing Zhang
abstract: Arc welding processes are essential for continuous fabrication but prone to disturbances that impair weld quality, making real-time monitoring critical yet difficult due to complex visual patterns and nonlinear, time-varying dynamics. Deep learning shows promise but faces scalability limits because of its dependence on large labeled datasets and application-specific tuning. We explore whether a unified approach can characterize major arc welding processes across applications and improve scalability through consistent state monitoring. This paper introduces a robust and generalizable monitoring framework for arc welding. It combines unsupervised deep latent representation learning, which extracts compact features from weld pool images, with Bayesian filtering to handle persistent and fluctuating disturbances such as arc radiation and specular reflections. Specifically, a Dynamic Variational Autoencoder (DVAE), consisting of a CNN-based encoder-decoder and an LSTM-based transition model, jointly learns latent representations and their evolution under control inputs. For robust real-time inference, a specialized Particle Filter (PF) propagates the latent and LSTM hidden states, preserving process history while suppressing sensor noise. This design is well suited to welding's slow and inertial dynamics. Validation on GTAW and GMAW without process-specific tuning demonstrates the framework's generalizability and robustness.

infographic.key_insight: A unified DVAE + particle filter framework can learn latent weld-pool dynamics and monitor arc welding robustly across different processes without process-specific tuning.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables more reliable real-time quality monitoring for welding lines by reducing sensitivity to arc radiation, reflections, and other disturbances.
method: CNN-based encoder-decoder learns compact latent features from weld-pool images.
LSTM transition model captures time-evolving latent dynamics under control inputs.
Particle filter tracks latent and hidden states online to suppress sensor noise and preserve process history.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports validation on both GTAW and GMAW, showing generalizability and robustness without process-specific tuning.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may still depend on image quality and the particle filter’s computational cost for real-time deployment.
infographic.paper_title: Robust Monitoring of Arc Welding Processes: A Generalizable Framework with DVAE and Particle Filter

zh-Hans.title: 具有 DVAE 和粒子滤波器的稳健弧焊过程监测：一种可泛化框架
zh-Hans.abstract: 弧焊过程是连续制造中的关键环节，但容易受到扰动影响焊缝质量，因此实时监测至关重要，但由于视觉模式复杂以及非线性、时变动力学而变得困难。深度学习显示出潜力，但由于其依赖大规模标注数据集且需要针对具体应用进行调参，因而在可扩展性方面存在限制。我们探讨一种统一方法是否能够表征不同应用中的主要弧焊过程，并通过一致的状态监测提升可扩展性。本文提出一种用于弧焊的稳健且可泛化的监测框架。该框架将无监督深度潜变量表示学习与贝叶斯滤波相结合，前者从熔池图像中提取紧凑特征，后者用于处理诸如电弧辐射和镜面反射等持续性与波动性扰动。具体而言，动态变分自编码器（DVAE）由基于 CNN 的编码器-解码器和基于 LSTM 的转移模型组成，联合学习潜在表示及其在控制输入作用下的演化。为实现稳健的实时推断，专门设计的粒子滤波器（PF）传播潜在状态和 LSTM 隐状态，在抑制传感器噪声的同时保留过程历史。该设计非常适合焊接缓慢且具有惯性的动力学特性。对 GTAW 和 GMAW 的验证表明，无需针对特定工艺进行调参，该框架即可展现出良好的泛化性和鲁棒性。

infographic.key_insight: 统一的 DVAE + 粒子滤波器框架能够学习潜在的熔池动力学，并在不同工艺之间无需针对特定工艺调参即可稳健监测弧焊过程。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这可通过降低对电弧辐射、反射及其他扰动的敏感性，为焊接生产线提供更可靠的实时质量监测。
method: 基于 CNN 的编码器-解码器从熔池图像中学习紧凑的潜在特征。
LSTM 转移模型在控制输入作用下捕捉随时间演化的潜在动力学。
粒子滤波器在线跟踪潜在状态和隐状态，以抑制传感器噪声并保留过程历史。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了对 GTAW 和 GMAW 的验证，表明在无需针对特定工艺调参的情况下具有泛化性和鲁棒性。
infographic.watch_item: 性能仍可能取决于图像质量以及粒子滤波器在实时部署中的计算开销。

title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
authors: Sneha Samal, Shrikant Joshi, Stefan Björklund, Mohit Chandra, Akhil Bhardwaj, Jaromír Kopeček
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.

infographic.key_insight: HVAF spraying can produce thick NiTi coatings that retain martensitic transformation and shape-memory functionality after post-annealing, despite a heterogeneous as-sprayed microstructure.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical route to functional NiTi surface layers for wear, friction, corrosion, and thermal-actuation applications on steel components.
method: HVAF sprayed NiTi onto mild steel using four processing parameter sets
Characterized composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation, and thermomechanical response
Compared as-sprayed and annealed behavior using bending, nanoindentation, and scratch tests
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports 100–300 μm coatings that underwent martensitic transformation and showed thermal actuation and shape-memory effects in mechanical tests.
infographic.watch_item: As-sprayed coatings are microstructurally inhomogeneous with oxides, voids, and residual stress, so annealing and adhesion/strength limits must be considered before deployment.
infographic.paper_title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior

zh-Hans.title: HVAF喷涂NiTi涂层：显微组织、相变与形状记忆行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 在工程部件表面沉积各种涂层以提高其在耐磨、耐腐蚀、减摩和热防护方面的性能，已是一种标准做法。沉积金属NiTi形状记忆合金涂层可能是硬质陶瓷涂层的一种可行替代方案。NiTi涂层还具有源自独特功能热机械性能的附加优势。然而，制备厚的NiTi涂层被证明是困难的。标准电镀和激光熔覆方法并不适用于NiTi；最广泛使用的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学成分不均匀、且不会发生马氏体转变的涂层，而冷喷NiTi涂层则存在与基体结合不良的问题。本文报道了首次成功制备出厚NiTi涂层（100-300 um），其既表现出功能热机械性能，同时又与基体具有非常良好的附着性。我们采用高速空气燃料热喷涂方法，在低碳钢基体上使用四组不同的工艺参数制备了NiTi涂层。对NiTi涂层的化学成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变以及功能热机械性能进行了评估。尽管这些涂层包含不均匀的显微组织、孔洞、氧化物颗粒、高密度位错缺陷和内应力，但它们在冷却和/或机械加载过程中会发生马氏体转变。喷涂态NiTi涂层需要经过退火才能表现出功能热机械性能。尽管其拉伸强度有限，这些涂层仍在三点弯曲试验中表现出热致驱动，并在纳米压痕和划痕试验中表现出形状记忆效应。

infographic.key_insight: HVAF喷涂可制备厚NiTi涂层；尽管喷涂态显微组织呈非均匀状态，经过后续退火后仍可保留马氏体转变和形状记忆功能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为钢制部件上的功能NiTi表层提供了一条实用路径，可用于耐磨、减摩、耐腐蚀和热致驱动应用。
method: 采用HVAF在低碳钢上以四组工艺参数喷涂NiTi
表征成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变以及热机械响应
通过弯曲、纳米压痕和划痕试验比较喷涂态与退火态行为
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了100–300 μm厚的涂层，可发生马氏体转变，并在机械测试中表现出热致驱动和形状记忆效应。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂态涂层在显微组织上不均匀，含有氧化物、孔洞和残余应力，因此在应用前必须考虑退火处理以及附着力/强度限制。

title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
authors: Sen Li, Xiaoying Liu, Xiaojian Xu, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Ling Lan
abstract: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel algorithm that achieves high classification accuracy in laser welding penetration prediction using only a limited number of labelled images. This approach effectively overcomes the limitations of supervised learning classification algorithms, which are hindered in industrial applications by their dependence on extensive, high-quality labelled data. The core of SimPhysNet is a unique self-supervised learning paradigm that embeds physical priors into a contrastive learning framework. By incorporating a physics-informed neural network (PINN), the model is guided to extract physically meaningful features of the molten pool and keyhole from a large set of unlabelled data, while three image augmentation tasks further enhance its generalization capabilities. Subsequently, a few-shot learning strategy, based on prototypical networks, enables robust classification by constructing class representations from a minimal set of labelled images. Experimental results demonstrate that SimPhysNet achieves a classification accuracy of 96.06% using only 200 labelled images (approximately 5% of the total labelled dataset), which is comparable to the performance of conventional supervised learning algorithms that utilize the entire labelled dataset. This work presents a new, efficient, and highly accurate method, providing the way for the intelligent automation of laser welding.

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet combines physics-informed self-supervised learning with few-shot prototypical classification to predict laser welding penetration accurately from very limited labels.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The method can reduce annotation burden while enabling reliable, high-throughput penetration-state monitoring for industrial laser welding quality control.
method: Physics-informed neural network guides feature learning from abundant unlabeled molten-pool/keyhole images.
Three image augmentation tasks strengthen contrastive self-supervised representation learning.
Few-shot prototypical networks classify penetration state using only a small labeled set.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports 96.06% classification accuracy using 200 labeled images, about 5% of the labeled dataset, comparable to fully supervised baselines.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality and representativeness of the unlabeled welding images and on how well the physics priors generalize across machines and process conditions.
infographic.paper_title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks

zh-Hans.title: 一种基于使用物理信息神经网络的自监督学习的激光焊接过程焊深预测模型
zh-Hans.abstract: 激光焊接全熔透至关重要，因为它是实现无缺陷焊接接头的基本因素之一。因此，准确预测熔深状态对于确保焊接质量是必不可少的。为此，本文提出了 SimPhysNet，这是一种新颖的算法，仅利用少量标注图像即可在激光焊接熔深预测中实现较高的分类精度。该方法有效克服了监督学习分类算法的局限性；这类算法在工业应用中由于依赖大量高质量标注数据而受到制约。SimPhysNet 的核心是一种独特的自监督学习范式，它将物理先验嵌入对比学习框架。通过引入物理信息神经网络（PINN），模型在大量未标注数据的引导下提取熔池和小孔的物理有意义特征，同时三种图像增强任务进一步提升了其泛化能力。随后，基于原型网络的少样本学习策略通过从极少量标注图像中构建类别表征，实现了鲁棒分类。实验结果表明，SimPhysNet 仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占标注数据集总量的 5%）即可达到 96.06% 的分类准确率，这与使用整个标注数据集的传统监督学习算法性能相当。该工作提出了一种新颖、高效且高精度的方法，为激光焊接的智能自动化提供了途径。

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet 将物理信息自监督学习与少样本原型分类相结合，仅凭极少标注即可准确预测激光焊接熔深。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法可减少标注负担，同时支持工业激光焊接质量控制中的可靠、高通量熔深状态监测。
method: 物理信息神经网络引导从大量未标注熔池/小孔图像中学习特征。
三种图像增强任务强化对比式自监督表征学习。
少样本原型网络仅用少量标注集分类熔深状态。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告显示，使用 200 张标注图像（约为标注数据集的 5%）即可获得 96.06% 的分类准确率，与全监督基线相当。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于未标注焊接图像的质量与代表性，以及物理先验在不同设备和工艺条件下的泛化程度。

title: System-Level Automation Strategies for Improving Positional Accuracy in Robotic Welding for High-Reliability Manufacturing
authors: Sangat Naik
abstract: Robotic welding has become a critical enabling technology in high-reliability manufacturing environments, particularly in aerospace and space-grade production systems where dimensional accuracy and repeatability are essential. While conventional approaches to accuracy enhancement often rely on hardware upgrades, calibration refinement, or sensor-based feedback systems, comparatively limited attention has been given to structured automation-logic optimization as a pathway for improving welding precision. This paper proposes a system-level automation accuracy framework for robotic welding applications, emphasizing repeatable initialization, structured task sequencing, conservative motion planning, and transition smoothness control. Rather than modifying hardware architecture, the proposed framework targets error propagation mechanisms arising from kinematic tolerances, motion discontinuities, and cumulative trajectory deviations. By analyzing robotic welding as an integrated automation system, the study establishes a structured methodology for improving positional consistency in high-reliability manufacturing contexts. The framework is particularly relevant to space manufacturing environments, where stability, predictability, and conservative control design are prioritized over aggressive performance optimization. The proposed approach provides a foundation for future integration with digital twin and intelligent manufacturing systems.
venue: Zenodo (CERN European Organization for Nuclear Research)

infographic.key_insight: Robotic welding positional accuracy can be improved by optimizing system-level automation logic—such as initialization, sequencing, motion planning, and transition control—without changing the hardware.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The framework is directly relevant to high-reliability aerospace and space manufacturing, where repeatability and conservative control are more important than maximum speed or aggressive optimization.
method: Repeatable initialization to reduce setup variability
Structured task sequencing to limit error accumulation
Conservative motion planning with smooth transitions to minimize trajectory deviations
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract presents a conceptual framework and methodology for accuracy improvement, but does not report quantitative experiments, datasets, or benchmark results.
infographic.watch_item: Because the approach is logic- and workflow-focused, its real-world benefit will depend on integration with specific robot controllers and validation on production welding tasks.
infographic.paper_title: System-Level Automation Strategies for Improving Positional Accuracy in Robotic Welding for High-Reliability Manufacturing

zh-Hans.title: 用于提高高可靠性制造中机器人焊接位置精度的系统级自动化策略
zh-Hans.abstract: 机器人焊接已成为高可靠性制造环境中的关键使能技术，尤其是在航空航天和航天级生产系统中，尺寸精度和重复性至关重要。尽管传统的精度提升方法往往依赖硬件升级、校准改进或基于传感器的反馈系统，但对于通过结构化自动化逻辑优化来提升焊接精度这一途径，现有关注相对有限。本文提出一种用于机器人焊接应用的系统级自动化精度框架，强调可重复初始化、结构化任务排序、保守运动规划以及平滑过渡控制。该框架并不修改硬件架构，而是针对由运动学公差、运动不连续性以及累积轨迹偏差引起的误差传播机制。通过将机器人焊接分析为一个集成自动化系统，本研究建立了一套用于提升高可靠性制造场景中位置一致性的结构化方法。该框架尤其适用于航天制造环境，在这类环境中，稳定性、可预测性以及保守的控制设计比激进的性能优化更为重要。所提出的方法为未来与数字孪生和智能制造系统的集成奠定了基础。

infographic.key_insight: 通过优化系统级自动化逻辑——例如初始化、排序、运动规划和过渡控制——可以在不改变硬件的情况下提高机器人焊接的位置精度。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该框架与高可靠性航空航天及航天制造直接相关，在这些场景中，重复性和保守控制比最高速度或激进优化更为重要。
method: 通过可重复初始化减少设置差异
通过结构化任务排序限制误差累积
采用保守的运动规划和平滑过渡以最小化轨迹偏差
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要提出了一个用于精度提升的概念框架和方法，但未报告定量实验、数据集或基准结果。
infographic.watch_item: 由于该方法聚焦于逻辑和工作流程，其实际效果将取决于与特定机器人控制器的集成，以及在生产焊接任务中的验证。

infographic.key_insight: The paper argues that robotic welding accuracy can be improved primarily through automation-logic design—repeatable initialization, structured sequencing, conservative motion planning, and smoother transitions—rather than hardware changes.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This is relevant for high-reliability manufacturing, especially aerospace and space-grade production, where positional consistency and predictable control are more important than maximum speed or aggressive optimization.
method: Standardize robot startup and initialization routines
Use structured task sequencing to reduce cumulative positioning error
Apply conservative motion planning and transition-smoothness control

zh-Hans.title: 用于提高高可靠性制造中机器人焊接位置精度的系统级自动化策略
zh-Hans.abstract: 机器人焊接已成为高可靠性制造环境中的关键使能技术，尤其是在航空航天和航天级生产系统中，尺寸精度和重复性至关重要。尽管传统的精度提升方法通常依赖硬件升级、校准精化或基于传感器的反馈系统，但相较之下，作为提高焊接精度途径的结构化自动化逻辑优化所受到的关注仍然有限。本文提出一种用于机器人焊接应用的系统级自动化精度框架，强调可重复初始化、结构化任务排序、保守运动规划以及过渡平滑性控制。所提出的框架并不修改硬件架构，而是针对由运动学公差、运动不连续性和累积轨迹偏差引起的误差传播机制。通过将机器人焊接分析为一个集成自动化系统，本研究建立了一种用于提升高可靠性制造场景中位置一致性的结构化方法论。该框架尤其适用于航天制造环境，在这类环境中，稳定性、可预测性和保守的控制设计优先于激进的性能优化。所提出的方法为未来与数字孪生和智能制造系统的集成奠定了基础。

infographic.key_insight: 本文认为，机器人焊接精度主要可以通过自动化逻辑设计来提升——包括可重复初始化、结构化排序、保守运动规划和更平滑的过渡——而非依赖硬件变更。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这对于高可靠性制造尤其具有意义，特别是航空航天和航天级生产领域，在这些场景中，位置一致性和可预测控制比最高速度或激进优化更重要。
method: 标准化机器人启动和初始化流程
采用结构化任务排序以减少累积定位误差
应用保守运动规划和过渡平滑性控制
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要提出了一个框架性方案，并对误差传播进行了概念性分析，但未报告实验数据集、定量精度提升或基准验证。
infographic.watch_item: 如果工厂条件、机器人运动学或焊接变化性需要传感器反馈或超出自动化逻辑优化范围的硬件校准，则该方法可能受到限制。

title: Effects of Laser Welding on the Microstructure and Fatigue Behavior of Strenx 700 CR Steel
authors: William Haupt, João Vitor Miszewski, Diogo Teixeira, Cleiton Gnich, Matheus Giongo Pavan, Lucas Ghellioni Borges
abstract: Abstract This study examines the cold-rolled microalloyed steel Strenx 700, with a minimum yield strength of 700 MPa, used in the manufacture of agricultural machinery and implements. The aim is to improve the weight/mechanical strength ratio and apply new advanced welding processes, such as laser welding. In the context of the agricultural machinery industry, laser welding is gaining prominence in the welding of thin microalloyed steels, mainly due to its small heat-affected zone and welding speed, which allow for superior mechanical properties, longer fatigue life, and excellent surface finish of welded joints compared to GMAW and GTAW welding processes. In this context, the behavior of laser-welded joints in Strenx 700 microalloyed steel was evaluated in the welding of plates used in agricultural implement components subjected to cyclic loads. The microstructural properties, mechanical properties, and fatigue life are not yet clearly documented in the literature. This work aimed to evaluate the performance of manual welds produced using a CO₂ laser process and to elucidate their effects on the microstructure, mechanical properties, and fatigue behavior of 2 mm thick Strenx 700 cold-rolled steel sheets. Based on technical evaluations through pre-tests, it was determined that the welds would be performed autogenously with welding powers of 1100, 1300, and 1500 Watts, using joints with parallel edge preparation without root opening, in order to optimize the processes and reduce industrial costs. After welding, joint characterization was performed using macrographs and micrographs obtained by optical and electron microscopy, in addition to microhardness mapping, tensile testing, and evaluation of uniaxial fatigue life in tension-tension conditions. The results indicate satisfactory macroscopic weld formation. In the fusion zone, the microstructure consisted predominantly of martensite, Widmanstätten ferrite and bainite. In the coarse-grained heat-affected zone (CGA), bainite, Widmanstätten ferrite, and martensite were observed, while in the fine-grained heat-affected zone (FGA), ferrite and martensite were identified. The base metal was composed of ferrite, bainite, and martensite. The mechanical strength of the welded joints was comparable to that of the base metal; however, the elongation values were lower than those of the base metal. The mean fatigue life of the base material was 450,128 cycles, significantly higher than that of the welded conditions, with average values of 50,055 cycles for the welded group (c), followed by group (b) with 44,962 cycles, while the welded group (a) presented a mean fatigue life of 30,338 cycles. As main conclusions, we can observe the good microstructural formation of the joints for all welding conditions, with adequate mechanical strength values, but with reduced elongation and predominant fracture in the heat-affected zone and in the fusion region. It is also possible to conclude that the average fatigue life values were lower for the welded conditions compared to the base material, this result being strongly impacted by the presence of welding defects related to the process.
venue: Lasers in Manufacturing and Materials Processing

infographic.key_insight: Autogenous CO₂ laser welding can produce sound joints in 2 mm Strenx 700 steel while creating a narrow, highly hardened fusion zone dominated by martensite, bainite, and Widmanstätten ferrite.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For lightweight agricultural machinery, laser welding offers a promising route to preserve high strength and potentially extend fatigue life versus conventional arc welding, but the weld microstructure must be tightly controlled.
method: Autogenous laser welding of 2 mm Strenx 700 sheets at 1100, 1300, and 1500 W
Parallel-edge joints with no root opening to reduce process complexity and cost
Post-weld macro/microstructural analysis, microhardness mapping, tensile testing, and tension-tension fatigue testing
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports satisfactory weld formation and detailed zone-specific microstructures, with performance assessed using microscopy, hardness, tensile, and uniaxial fatigue evaluations.
infographic.watch_item: The study is based on manual welds and a limited parameter set, so process robustness and industrial repeatability still need validation.
infographic.paper_title: Effects of Laser Welding on the Microstructure and Fatigue Behavior of Strenx 700 CR Steel

zh-Hans.title: 激光焊接对Strenx 700 CR钢显微组织和疲劳行为的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 本研究考察了冷轧微合金钢Strenx 700，其最低屈服强度为700 MPa，应用于农业机械和农具的制造。其目标是提高重量/机械强度比，并采用新的先进焊接工艺，如激光焊接。在农业机械行业背景下，激光焊接在薄微合金钢焊接中的重要性日益提升，主要由于其热影响区小、焊接速度快，与GMAW和GTAW焊接工艺相比，可使焊接接头获得更优的力学性能、更长的疲劳寿命以及优良的表面质量。在此背景下，评估了Strenx 700微合金钢激光焊接接头在农业农具部件板材焊接中的行为，这些部件承受循环载荷。其显微组织特征、力学性能和疲劳寿命在文献中尚未得到明确记载。本工作旨在评估采用CO₂激光工艺制备的手工焊接接头的性能，并阐明其对厚度为2 mm的Strenx 700冷轧钢板显微组织、力学性能和疲劳行为的影响。基于预试验的技术评估，确定焊接采用自熔方式，焊接功率分别为1100、1300和1500 W，接头形式为无根部间隙的平行边缘坡口，以优化工艺并降低工业成本。焊后，利用光学显微镜和电子显微镜获得的宏观和微观图像对接头进行表征，并辅以显微硬度分布测试、拉伸试验以及在拉-拉条件下的单轴疲劳寿命评估。结果表明焊缝宏观成形令人满意。在熔合区，显微组织主要由马氏体、Widmanstätten铁素体和贝氏体组成；在粗晶热影响区（CGA）观察到贝氏体、Widmanstätten铁素体和马氏体；而在细晶热影响区（FGA）则识别出铁素体和马氏体。母材由铁素体、贝氏体和马氏体组成。焊接接头的力学强度与母材相当；然而，其伸长率低于母材。母材的平均疲劳寿命为450,128次循环，显著高于焊接状态；焊接组(c)的平均值为50,055次循环，其次为组(b)的44,962次循环，而焊接组(a)的平均疲劳寿命为30,338次循环。主要结论为：在所有焊接条件下，接头均表现出良好的显微组织形成，并具有适当的力学强度值，但伸长率降低，且断裂主要发生在热影响区和熔合区。还可以得出结论，与母材相比，焊接状态的平均疲劳寿命更低，这一结果受到与该工艺相关的焊接缺陷的显著影响。

infographic.key_insight: 自熔CO₂激光焊接可在2 mm Strenx 700钢中形成质量良好的接头，同时生成窄而高度硬化的熔合区，其主要组织为马氏体、贝氏体和Widmanstätten铁素体。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于轻量化农业机械，激光焊接为在保持高强度的同时，相较于传统电弧焊可能延长疲劳寿命提供了一条有前景的途径，但必须严格控制焊缝显微组织。
method: 对2 mm Strenx 700板材进行自熔激光焊接，功率分别为1100、1300和1500 W
采用无根部间隙的平行边缘接头，以降低工艺复杂性和成本
焊后进行宏/微观组织分析、显微硬度分布测试、拉伸试验和拉-拉疲劳试验
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了令人满意的焊缝成形和详细的分区显微组织，并通过显微镜、硬度、拉伸和单轴疲劳评估对性能进行了分析。
infographic.watch_item: 该研究基于手工焊接和有限的参数集，因此工艺鲁棒性和工业重复性仍需验证。

title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene
authors: A. Alhourani, I. Barsoum, J. Sheikh-Ahmad, S. Deveci
abstract: Friction stir welding (FSW) has gained recognition as an effective technique for joining thermoplastic materials. This study presents a comprehensive investigation to predict FSW characteristics such as weld temperatures, vertical axial forces, material flow and defect formation in FSW of high-density polyethylene (HDPE) using both computational and machine learning approaches, validated by experimental results. A three-dimensional Coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) numerical model is developed to simulate the HDPE welding process under varying process parameters of rotational and welding speeds, and bottom preheating conditions. The CEL numerical model is validated against experimental data, showing markedly good agreement in predicting void formation, thermal and mechanical responses. Results indicate that preheating the bottom surface proved effective in reducing thermal gradients and stabilizing vertical force fluctuations. Quantitatively, bottom-surface preheating at 60 °C reduced peak plunge force from 1600 N close to 1100 N and raised peak temperatures from 70 °C (without preheat) to about 100 °C, hence smoothing through-thickness gradients and stabilizing the axial force distribution. In parallel, two multilayer perceptron artificial neural networks (ANNs) are trained on experimental data to predict temporal temperature and axial force responses with R2 between 0.91 and 0.99, demonstrating high accuracy and strong generalization across the tested FSW parameter space. The computational CEL simulations accurately predicted weld zone morphology, including stir zone, thermo-mechanically affected zone and heat-affected zone, however the combined CEL–ANN framework enables rapid generation of process maps that highlights defective and defect-free welding windows, with optimal conditions obtained at 1500 rpm and 30 mm/min with 60 °C preheating, and poor weldability observed at 1000 rpm without preheating due to wormhole formation. These findings provide process-driven design guidelines for developing robust HDPE joints and demonstrate how integrating computational modeling with machine learning enables efficient optimization, offering valuable insights into the key characteristics of the FSW process in thermoplastics and supporting its broader adoption in industrial applications.

infographic.key_insight: A combined CEL simulation and ANN framework can accurately predict and optimize friction stir welding quality in HDPE by linking process settings to temperature, force, and defect formation.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study provides practical welding windows that improve joint robustness, showing that bottom preheating and higher rotational speed can reduce force fluctuations and defect risk in thermoplastic FSW.
method: 3D coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) model for thermal-mechanical welding behavior
Two multilayer perceptron ANNs trained on experimental responses for temperature and axial force prediction
Experimental validation across rotational speed, welding speed, and bottom preheating conditions
infographic.evidence_signal: The ANN models achieved strong predictive performance with R2 values between 0.91 and 0.99, and the CEL model matched observed void formation and thermal-mechanical responses well.
infographic.watch_item: The process map is based on a limited experimental parameter range, so predictions may not generalize reliably outside the tested speeds and preheating conditions.
infographic.paper_title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene

zh-Hans.title: 用于高密度聚乙烯搅拌摩擦焊接中焊缝质量预测的计算与机器学习建模方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 搅拌摩擦焊接（FSW）已被公认为一种连接热塑性材料的有效技术。本研究采用计算与机器学习方法，并结合实验结果验证，系统研究了高密度聚乙烯（HDPE）搅拌摩擦焊接中的焊接温度、竖直轴向力、材料流动和缺陷形成等FSW特征的预测。建立了三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）数值模型，用于模拟不同工艺参数——转速、焊接速度以及底部预热条件——下的HDPE焊接过程。CEL数值模型通过实验数据进行了验证，在预测孔洞形成以及热和力学响应方面表现出显著良好的一致性。结果表明，对底部表面进行预热可有效减小温度梯度并稳定竖直力波动。定量而言，底表面在60 °C预热时，最大压入力从接近1600 N降至约1100 N，而峰值温度则从70 °C（无预热）升至约100 °C，从而平滑了厚度方向梯度并稳定了轴向力分布。与此同时，基于实验数据训练了两个多层感知器人工神经网络（ANNs），用于预测温度和轴向力的时序响应，其R2介于0.91和0.99之间，表明在所测试的FSW参数空间内具有较高精度和较强泛化能力。计算CEL模拟能够准确预测焊缝区形貌，包括搅拌区、热机械影响区和热影响区；此外，CEL–ANN联合框架能够快速生成工艺图，突出显示有缺陷和无缺陷的焊接窗口，其中在1500 rpm、30 mm/min并采用60 °C预热时获得最优条件，而在1000 rpm且无预热时由于虫洞形成而观察到较差的可焊性。这些发现为开发稳健的HDPE接头提供了基于工艺的设计指南，并表明将计算建模与机器学习相结合能够实现高效优化，为理解热塑性材料FSW过程的关键特征提供了有价值的见解，并支持其在工业应用中的更广泛采用。

infographic.key_insight: 结合CEL仿真与ANN框架，可通过将工艺设定与温度、力和缺陷形成联系起来，准确预测并优化HDPE搅拌摩擦焊质量。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究提供了可提升接头稳健性的实用焊接窗口，表明底部预热和较高转速可降低热塑性FSW中的力波动和缺陷风险。
method: 用于热-机械焊接行为的三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）模型
基于实验响应训练的两个多层感知器ANN，用于温度和轴向力预测
在转速、焊接速度和底部预热条件下进行实验验证
infographic.evidence_signal: ANN模型表现出较强的预测性能，R2值介于0.91和0.99之间，CEL模型与观测到的孔洞形成及热-机械响应吻合良好。
infographic.watch_item: 该工艺图基于有限的实验参数范围，因此其预测在所测试的转速和预热条件之外可能无法可靠泛化。

title: COMPARATIVE INVESTIGATIONS ON THE WELD DEPTH OF PENETRATION IN ACTIVATED TIG WELDING OF STAINLESS STEEL THROUGH THE USE OF BINARY FLUX MIXTURE
authors: R. Sakthivel, M. Sudhahar, Kannan V
abstract: Conventional Tungsten Inert Gas (TIG) welding is widely employed for joining stainless steel; however, its relatively shallow weld penetration often requires multiple welding passes and additional joint preparation for medium-thickness plates. Activated Tungsten Inert Gas (A-TIG) welding offers an effective alternative by employing activating fluxes to improve heat concentration within the weld zone. The present study investigates the effect of a binary oxide flux consisting of zirconium dioxide (ZrO₂) and aluminium oxide (Al₂O₃) on the weld penetration characteristics of AISI 304 austenitic stainless steel through a comparative evaluation of conventional TIG and ATIG welding. Bead-on-plate welding experiments were carried out under identical process parameters using an automated welding system to ensure that the influence of the binary flux could be evaluated independently. The welded specimens were prepared using standard metallographic procedures, and the weld bead geometry was assessed by measuring penetration depth, bead width, and the depth-to-width ratio. The experimental observations showed that the application of the ZrO₂–Al₂O₃ binary flux produced a deeper and narrower weld profile than conventional TIG welding, indicating improved utilisation of heat within the fusion zone. The enhancement in weld geometry is attributed to the combined influence of arc constriction and the modification of molten metal flow within the weld pool. The results demonstrate that the proposed binary oxide flux is an effective approach for improving weld penetration and can contribute to more efficient single-pass welding of medium-thickness AISI 304 stainless steel components.
venue: International Journal of Drug Delivery Technology

infographic.key_insight: A ZrO2–Al2O3 binary activating flux makes A-TIG welding produce a deeper, narrower penetration than conventional TIG on AISI 304 stainless steel.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This approach can reduce the need for multiple passes and improve efficiency in medium-thickness stainless-steel welding.
method: Bead-on-plate welds were made on AISI 304 using automated TIG and A-TIG under identical process settings.
A binary oxide flux of zirconium dioxide (ZrO2) and aluminium oxide (Al2O3) was applied for the activated condition.
Weld geometry was measured by penetration depth, bead width, and depth-to-width ratio after metallographic preparation.
infographic.evidence_signal: Comparative measurements showed that the binary-flux A-TIG welds had greater penetration and a narrower bead profile than conventional TIG welds.
infographic.watch_item: Results are based on a specific flux mix and a single stainless-steel grade, so performance may not transfer directly to other alloys, thicknesses, or welding settings.
infographic.paper_title: COMPARATIVE INVESTIGATIONS ON THE WELD DEPTH OF PENETRATION IN ACTIVATED TIG WELDING OF STAINLESS STEEL THROUGH THE USE OF BINARY FLUX MIXTURE

zh-Hans.title: 通过使用二元熔剂混合物对不锈钢活化 TIG 焊接熔深的比较研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 传统钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊广泛用于不锈钢连接；然而，其相对较浅的焊缝熔深通常需要多道焊接，并且对于中等厚度板材还需要额外的接头准备。活化钨极惰性气体（A-TIG）焊通过采用活化熔剂来提高焊接区内的热量集中，提供了一种有效的替代方法。本研究通过对传统 TIG 和 ATIG 焊接的比较评估，考察了由二氧化锆（ZrO₂）和氧化铝（Al₂O₃）组成的二元氧化物熔剂对 AISI 304 奥氏体不锈钢焊缝熔深特性的影响。采用自动化焊接系统，在相同工艺参数下进行了平板堆焊实验，以确保能够独立评估二元熔剂的影响。焊接试样按照标准金相制备流程制备，并通过测量熔深、焊道宽度以及深宽比对焊缝几何形貌进行评估。实验观察表明，施加 ZrO₂–Al₂O₃ 二元熔剂后获得的焊缝轮廓比传统 TIG 焊更深且更窄，表明熔合区内热量利用更加充分。焊缝几何形貌的改善归因于电弧收缩以及熔池内熔融金属流动改变的共同作用。结果表明，所提出的二元氧化物熔剂是提高焊缝熔深的有效方法，并有助于实现中等厚度 AISI 304 不锈钢部件更高效的单道焊接。

infographic.key_insight: ZrO2–Al2O3 二元活化熔剂使 A-TIG 焊在 AISI 304 不锈钢上形成比传统 TIG 更深、更窄的熔深。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法可减少多道焊的需求，并提高中等厚度不锈钢焊接效率。
method: 在相同工艺参数下，使用自动 TIG 和 A-TIG 在 AISI 304 上进行了平板堆焊。
在活化条件下施加了由二氧化锆（ZrO2）和氧化铝（Al2O3）组成的二元氧化物熔剂。
金相制备后，通过测量熔深、焊道宽度和深宽比对焊缝几何形貌进行评估。
infographic.evidence_signal: 比较测量表明，采用二元熔剂的 A-TIG 焊缝相比传统 TIG 焊缝具有更大的熔深和更窄的焊道轮廓。
infographic.watch_item: 结果基于特定的熔剂配比和单一不锈钢牌号，因此其性能可能不能直接推广到其他合金、厚度或焊接参数。

title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep learning model can jointly predict laser welding penetration state, penetration depth, and weld seam morphology from weld-pool images plus process parameters.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables in-situ quality monitoring and closed-loop control for laser penetration welding, helping reduce defects and improve weld consistency.
method: Uses CMOS camera top-view weld-pool images as the main sensing input.
Combines CNN-based spatial feature extraction with state-space modeling for temporal dynamics.
Trains a multi-task framework to predict penetration state, depth, and reconstructed cross-section morphology.
infographic.evidence_signal: On the test set, the model achieved 99.35% penetration-state accuracy, 1.79 mm penetration-depth error, and 95.65% cross-section reconstruction accuracy.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on camera viewpoint, welding setup, and dataset construction quality, so generalization to new materials or process windows should be verified.
infographic.paper_title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于预测激光焊接中熔深和形貌的多任务时空深度神经网络
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光穿透焊接中，对熔深状态和焊缝形貌的评估在确定焊接质量方面起着关键作用。本文系统介绍了一种创新的多任务深度学习模型，该模型能够高精度预测熔深状态、熔深以及焊缝形貌。监测平台依赖于在激光焊接过程中使用互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）相机采集的熔池图像。所提出的模型将从顶部熔池图像中提取的时空特征与焊接参数相结合，建立了一个基于卷积神经网络和状态空间模型的深度学习框架，以更高效地提取和处理时空信息。此外，本文提出了一种用于构建数据集的可靠方法，以增强所开发模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。测试集上的验证结果表明，熔深状态预测准确率可达99.35%，熔深预测误差为1.79毫米，焊缝截面重构准确率为95.65%。本研究为激光穿透焊接系统的原位质量控制策略提供了新的见解和方法。

infographic.key_insight: 多任务时空深度学习模型可以基于熔池图像和工艺参数，联合预测激光焊接的熔深状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得激光穿透焊接能够实现原位质量监测和闭环控制，有助于减少缺陷并提高焊缝一致性。
method: 使用CMOS相机的俯视熔池图像作为主要传感输入。
将基于CNN的空间特征提取与状态空间建模相结合，以刻画时间动态。
训练多任务框架以预测熔深状态、熔深以及重构的截面形貌。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在测试集上，该模型实现了99.35%的熔深状态准确率、1.79毫米的熔深误差以及95.65%的截面重构准确率。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能依赖于相机视角、焊接装置和数据集构建质量，因此需要验证其对新材料或新工艺窗口的泛化能力。

title: Design and Development of Automatic Seam Welding of Pipes
authors: F. K. Pathan, A. I. Gond, S. D. Aade, G.N. Deshpande
abstract: Productivity, operational safety, and uniform quality act as the vital drivers for modern manufacturing sectors. Industries continuously seek out advanced automation to secure market leadership and minimize dependency on highly variable manual interventions. This paper details the design, fabrication, and optimization of an automatic seam welding setup purposefully engineered for the continuous joining of cylindrical metal pipes. Utilizing a robust mechanical frame integrated with specialized workpiece-holding fixtures and programmable pneumatic clamping actuators, the system ensures rigid, vibration-free alignment throughout the operation. A dedicated gear motor drive mechanism, running within a controlled speed range of 10–15 RPM, governs the precise rotational velocity of the components to sustain continuous weld beads. The experimental phase involved a metallurgical and structural comparative analysis between Cold Rolled Carbon Steel (CRCS) and Medium Carbon Steel (ER34). Process parameters, including welding current ranges of 11–13 A and wall thicknesses of 2.5 mm, were closely evaluated. Crucially, the implementation of internal water-cooled CuCrZr alloy rotating wheel electrodes effectively minimized extreme heat buildup and localized degradation. The automated setup successfully suppressed joint leakage failure rates from a baseline of 15% down to less than 3%. Ultimately, this research yields a scalable, ergonomically secure, and highly productive manufacturing configuration that satisfies stringent industrial quality assurance standards while offering an accessible pathway toward full industrial automation. Keywords: Seam welding, Automation in welding, MIG welding, Cold Rolled Carbon Steel, ER34 Medium Carbon Steel, Manufacturing Engineering materials.
venue: International Scientific Journal of Engineering and Management

infographic.key_insight: An automated seam-welding system with controlled rotation and pneumatic fixturing can produce more uniform pipe welds while sharply reducing leakage failures.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The work shows how low-cost mechanical automation and thermal management can improve throughput, safety, and repeatability in pipe joining applications.
method: Built a rigid frame with specialized pipe-holding fixtures and programmable pneumatic clamps.
Used a gear-motor drive to maintain 10–15 RPM during continuous seam welding.
Integrated internal water-cooled CuCrZr rotating wheel electrodes to limit heat buildup.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports comparative testing on CRCS and ER34 pipes with 11–13 A welding current and 2.5 mm wall thickness, reducing leakage failure from about 15% to below 3%.
infographic.watch_item: Performance is reported for a narrow set of materials and process settings, so broader validation across pipe sizes, alloys, and duty cycles is still needed.
infographic.paper_title: Design and Development of Automatic Seam Welding of Pipes

zh-Hans.title: 管道自动焊缝焊接的设计与开发
zh-Hans.abstract: 生产效率、运行安全性和质量均匀性是现代制造业的关键驱动力。各行业持续寻求先进自动化，以确保市场竞争力并降低对高度不稳定的人工干预的依赖。本文详细介绍了一套自动焊缝焊接装置的设计、制造与优化，该装置专门用于圆柱形金属管道的连续连接。该系统采用坚固的机械框架，并集成专用工件夹持工装和可编程气动夹紧执行器，可在整个作业过程中确保刚性且无振动的对准。专用齿轮电机驱动机构在受控的10–15 RPM速度范围内运行，精确控制部件的旋转速度，以维持连续焊缝成形。实验阶段对冷轧碳钢（CRCS）与中碳钢（ER34）进行了冶金和结构对比分析。焊接电流范围为11–13 A、壁厚为2.5 mm等工艺参数均得到了仔细评估。尤其是，采用内部水冷CuCrZr合金旋转轮电极有效减少了极端热量积聚和局部劣化。该自动化装置成功将接头泄漏失效率从15%的基线降至3%以下。最终，本研究提出了一种可扩展、符合人体工学且高生产率的制造配置，能够满足严格的工业质量保证标准，同时为实现完全工业自动化提供了一条可行路径。关键词：焊缝焊接，焊接自动化，MIG焊接，冷轧碳钢，ER34中碳钢，制造工程材料。

infographic.key_insight: 采用受控旋转和气动夹具的自动焊缝焊接系统，可获得更均匀的管道焊缝，同时显著降低泄漏失效。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该工作表明，低成本机械自动化与热管理可提升管道连接应用中的吞吐量、安全性和重复性。
method: 构建了具有专用管道夹持工装和可编程气动夹具的刚性框架。
采用齿轮电机驱动，在连续焊缝焊接过程中维持10–15 RPM。
集成内部水冷CuCrZr旋转轮电极以限制热量积聚。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了对CRCS和ER34管道的对比测试，焊接电流为11–13 A、壁厚为2.5 mm，泄漏失效率从约15%降至3%以下。
infographic.watch_item: 报告的性能仅针对有限的材料和工艺设定，因此仍需在更广泛的管径、合金和工作循环条件下进行验证。

title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network
authors: Keonvin Park, Yong Ann Voeurn, Hyeokjun Kweon, Doyun Lee
abstract: Reliable seam segmentation is essential for autonomous robotic welding in construction, where harsh illumination, specular reflections, and thin weld geometries often degrade segmentation performance. This study proposes a reflection-robust seam segmentation framework that enhances a BiSeNetV2 backbone through transfer learning and a hybrid Cross-Entropy--Lovász loss. Rather than increasing architectural complexity, the proposed framework improves reflection robustness through learning-stability-oriented optimization. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves 81.76\% Joint IoU and 90.73\% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by +22.36 percentage points over the OHEM-based baseline while maintaining identical FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed. The proposed approach also recovers 96.33\% of severe zero-IoU failure cases under reflective conditions. Comparative experiments across BiSeNetV2, DeepLabV3+, UNet, and SegFormer further demonstrate that the proposed optimization strategy is particularly effective for lightweight real-time segmentation architectures. Qualitative analyses additionally show improved seam continuity and reflection robustness in challenging welding environments. These findings suggest that the proposed framework provides a practical and lightweight perception solution for robotic welding applications involving reflective metallic surfaces.

infographic.key_insight: Transfer-learning plus a Cross-Entropy–Lovász loss substantially improves BiSeNetV2 seam segmentation robustness under reflective welding conditions without increasing model size or speed.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical lightweight perception upgrade for autonomous construction welding robots that must detect thin seams on shiny, poorly lit metal surfaces in real time.
method: Start from a BiSeNetV2 backbone and apply transfer learning for seam segmentation.
Train with a hybrid Cross-Entropy–Lovász loss to improve boundary quality and region overlap.
Keep the architecture unchanged to preserve FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed.
infographic.evidence_signal: The proposed method reached 81.76% Joint IoU and 90.73% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by 22.36 percentage points over the OHEM baseline while recovering 96.33% of severe zero-IoU failures.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains are shown in the reported welding datasets and conditions, so robustness on different robots, sensors, and field environments still needs validation.
infographic.paper_title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network

zh-Hans.title: 通过迁移学习增强用于建筑自动焊接机器人的焊缝分割：应对双边分割网络的局限性
zh-Hans.abstract: 在自主机器人焊接中，可靠的焊缝分割至关重要；在建筑场景下，恶劣照明、镜面反射以及细窄焊缝几何形态常常会降低分割性能。本研究提出一种抗反射焊缝分割框架，通过迁移学习和混合 Cross-Entropy--Lovász 损失增强 BiSeNetV2 主干网络。与增加架构复杂度不同，所提出的框架通过面向学习稳定性的优化来提升抗反射能力。实验结果表明，所提出的方法取得了 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，在保持 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度完全相同的情况下，相比基于 OHEM 的基线，Joint IoU 提升了 +22.36 个百分点。该方法还在反射条件下恢复了 96.33% 的严重零 IoU 失败案例。跨 BiSeNetV2、DeepLabV3+、UNet 和 SegFormer 的对比实验进一步表明，所提出的优化策略对于轻量级实时分割架构尤其有效。定性分析还显示，在具有挑战性的焊接环境中，焊缝连续性和抗反射能力均得到改善。这些结果表明，所提出的框架为涉及反光金属表面的机器人焊接应用提供了一种实用且轻量化的感知解决方案。

infographic.key_insight: 迁移学习结合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 损失可在反射性焊接条件下显著提升 BiSeNetV2 焊缝分割鲁棒性，同时不增加模型规模或速度。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为自主建筑焊接机器人提供了一种实用的轻量化感知升级方案，使其能够实时检测光亮、低照度金属表面上的细窄焊缝。
method: 以 BiSeNetV2 主干网络为基础，并应用迁移学习进行焊缝分割。
采用混合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 损失进行训练，以提升边界质量和区域重叠。
保持架构不变，以维持 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度。
infographic.evidence_signal: 所提出的方法达到了 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，在相较于 OHEM 基线将 Joint IoU 提高 22.36 个百分点的同时，还恢复了 96.33% 的严重零 IoU 失败案例。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升结果基于所报告的焊接数据集和条件，因此在不同机器人、传感器和现场环境中的鲁棒性仍需验证。

title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: An unsupervised domain adaptation framework with gradual source-domain expansion enables weld penetration status prediction to transfer robustly between fundamentally different welding processes, including TIG and laser welding.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This reduces the need for costly relabeling when deploying intelligent weld monitoring across new processes, improving practical portability of inspection models in manufacturing.
method: Train a UDA model for penetration-state classification across source and target welding domains.
Use gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) to progressively widen source-domain coverage during adaptation.
Validate learned domain-invariant features with UMAP feature visualization.
infographic.evidence_signal: The method achieved 90.65% and 90.72% average accuracy in same-process TIG and laser tasks, and 80.48% (TIG→Laser) plus 81.13% (Laser→TIG) in cross-process transfer, substantially outperforming the supervised baseline.
infographic.watch_item: Cross-process deployment still depends on representative target-process data characteristics, so performance may drop if welding settings, sensors, or material conditions differ beyond the studied domains.
infographic.paper_title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding

zh-Hans.title: 一种基于激光与TIG焊接中无监督域适应的跨过程焊接熔深状态预测算法
zh-Hans.abstract: 监督式深度学习已被广泛用于焊缝熔深状态分类；然而，当模型在具有不同物理机制的焊接工艺之间迁移时，例如从电弧主导的钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊迁移到基于小孔的激光焊，其性能往往会因域偏移而显著下降。为克服这一局限，我们提出了一种集成渐进式源域扩展（GSDE）策略的无监督域适应（UDA）框架。在专门构建的TIG和激光焊接数据集上评估表明，该方法在同工艺和跨工艺迁移任务中均取得了较高准确率。具体而言，在同工艺设置下，其在TIGFH和LSPS上的平均准确率分别达到90.65%和90.72%，较监督基线分别提高35.83%和38.87%。更值得注意的是，在跨工艺场景中，TIG到Laser和Laser到TIG的准确率分别达到80.48%和81.13%，较基线分别提升43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可视化验证了该模型在保持可分辨类别边界的同时学习到了域不变特征。该方法显著降低了新焊接工艺的重新标注成本，并增强了智能监测在不同焊接系统中的通用性。

infographic.key_insight: 结合渐进式源域扩展的无监督域适应框架，使焊缝熔深状态预测能够在本质上不同的焊接工艺之间稳健迁移，包括TIG焊和激光焊。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这减少了在新工艺中部署智能焊缝监测时对高成本重新标注的需求，提高了检测模型在制造场景中的实际可移植性。
method: 训练一个用于熔深状态分类的UDA模型，使其能够在源域和目标焊接域之间进行迁移。
使用渐进式源域扩展（GSDE），在适应过程中逐步扩大源域覆盖范围。
利用UMAP特征可视化验证所学习到的域不变特征。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该方法在同工艺TIG和激光任务中的平均准确率分别达到90.65%和90.72%，在跨工艺迁移中TIG→Laser和Laser→TIG分别达到80.48%和81.13%，显著优于监督基线。
infographic.watch_item: 跨工艺部署仍依赖于具有代表性的目标工艺数据特征，因此如果焊接参数、传感器或材料条件超出所研究的域范围，性能可能下降。

title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach
authors: Selwyn Jebadurai Devaraj, A. Arul Jeya Kumar, A Queen Alice, V Manoj Kumar, S Arokya Agustin, A Sarath Chandra
abstract: Ti-6Al-4V alloy is used a lot in aerospace, biomedical and marine applications. This study investigates the tribological behaviour of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coated and uncoated Ti-6Al-4V alloy by experimental and machine learning approaches. An Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 ceramic coating, approximately 200 µm thick, was applied to Ti-6Al-4V alloy via the detonation gun (D-gun) process under regulated conditions (oxygen flow: 4800 SLPH, acetylene: 2150 SLPH, stand-off distance: 180 mm, particle velocity ∼1200 m/s). The wear behaviour of samples was tested using a pin-on-disc apparatus in accordance with ASTM G99 standards. Tests were conducted under normal loads of 40–100 N, sliding speeds of 100–200 rpm and durations of 20–40 min against an EN31 steel counter face. Scanning electron microscopy demonstrated that coated surfaces exhibited reduced wear and formed a protective tribo-layer. Machine learning models such as artificial neural networks, K-nearest neighbours and random forest were developed to predict wear based on sliding parameters. Random forest proved to be the best choice with less mean percentage error and mean squared error. The results showed that D-gun deposited Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coatings improved the wear performance of Ti-6Al-4V.
venue: Proceedings of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers Part E Journal of Process Mechanical Engineering

infographic.key_insight: A D-gun sprayed Al2O3-TiO2 coating significantly improves the tribological performance of Ti-6Al-4V, and random forest best predicts wear from sliding conditions.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This work supports using ceramic thermal-spray coatings plus data-driven wear prediction to extend the service life of aerospace, biomedical, and marine titanium components.
method: Applied ~200 µm Al2O3-TiO2 coating on Ti-6Al-4V using detonation gun spraying.
Tested wear with pin-on-disc (ASTM G99) under 40–100 N, 100–200 rpm, and 20–40 min against EN31 steel.
Trained ANN, KNN, and random forest models to predict wear from process/load parameters.
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM showed reduced wear and a protective tribo-layer on coated samples, and random forest achieved the lowest mean percentage error and mean squared error among the models.
infographic.watch_item: The machine-learning models appear to be based on a limited experimental parameter range, so generalization beyond the tested loads, speeds, and coating conditions should be validated.
infographic.paper_title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach

zh-Hans.title: Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun 涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学增强：一种机器学习方法
zh-Hans.abstract: Ti-6Al-4V 合金被广泛应用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋领域。本研究通过实验和机器学习方法，研究了 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层与未涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学行为。在受控条件下（氧气流量：4800 SLPH，乙炔：2150 SLPH，喷距：180 mm，颗粒速度约 1200 m/s），采用爆炸喷枪（D-gun）工艺在 Ti-6Al-4V 合金上沉积了厚度约 200 µm 的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 陶瓷涂层。按照 ASTM G99 标准，使用销-盘试验装置测试样品的磨损行为。试验在 EN31 钢对偶表面上进行，法向载荷为 40–100 N，滑动速度为 100–200 rpm，持续时间为 20–40 min。扫描电子显微镜结果表明，涂层表面磨损减小，并形成了保护性摩擦层。建立了人工神经网络、K 近邻和随机森林等机器学习模型，以基于滑动参数预测磨损。随机森林表现最佳，平均百分误差和均方误差更低。结果表明，D-gun 沉积的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性能。

infographic.key_insight: D-gun 喷涂的 Al2O3-TiO2 涂层显著提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的摩擦学性能，且随机森林最能根据滑动条件预测磨损。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 本研究支持将陶瓷热喷涂涂层与数据驱动的磨损预测相结合，以延长航空航天、生物医学和海洋钛合金部件的服役寿命。
method: 采用爆炸喷枪喷涂在 Ti-6Al-4V 上制备约 200 µm 厚的 Al2O3-TiO2 涂层。
按照 ASTM G99，使用销-盘法在 40–100 N、100–200 rpm 和 20–40 min 条件下，以 EN31 钢为对偶材料测试磨损。
训练 ANN、KNN 和随机森林模型，根据工艺/载荷参数预测磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM 显示涂层样品的磨损减小并形成保护性摩擦层，且在各模型中随机森林具有最低的平均百分误差和均方误差。
infographic.watch_item: 这些机器学习模型似乎基于有限的实验参数范围，因此在超出所测试载荷、速度和涂层条件之外的泛化能力需要验证。

title: Hot corrosion behavior of thermal sprayed using HVAF and DS techniques with Tribaloy-400 coatings for solar energy storage container
authors: P. Sakthivel, G. Sivakumar, M. Manikandan
abstract: The present study investigates the high-temperature corrosion behaviour of Tribaloy-400 (T-400) coatings deposited on ASTM A516 steel using two thermal spray techniques: (i) High Velocity Air Fuel (HVAF) spraying and (ii) Detonation Spraying (DS). The coated specimens were exposed to a molten solar salt environment consisting of 60% NaNO 3 –40% KNO 3 at 500 °C for exposure durations up to 1000 hours to evaluate their oxidation and corrosion resistance. Phase analysis indicated the formation of stable protective oxide phases, including Cr 2 O 3 , Co 3 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , in both coating systems. Elemental mapping revealed that the HVAF coating retained a uniform Cr–Mo–Si–O enriched surface with minimal molten salt penetration even after prolonged exposure of 1000 hours. In contrast, the DS coating exhibited comparatively deeper salt ingress into the coating microstructure, which contributed to increased degradation and spallation. SEM observations showed that the HVAF coatings possessed a dense and well-bonded microstructure, along with the formation of thermodynamically stable oxides such as Cr 2 O 3 , CoCr 2 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , resulting in superior resistance to molten salt-induced corrosion. However, the relatively porous nature of the DS coating promoted salt-assisted oxide dissolution, leading to higher mass gain, increased spallation, and accelerated degradation during extended exposure. Comparative evaluation of both coating techniques was carried out to identify a suitable coating process and feedstock combination for high-temperature CSP applications.
venue: Journal of Materials Research and Technology

infographic.key_insight: HVAF-sprayed Tribaloy-400 forms a denser, more protective oxide scale than detonation-sprayed T-400, giving better resistance to molten solar-salt corrosion at 500 °C.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For concentrated solar power thermal storage containers, HVAF T-400 coatings appear more durable than DS coatings under long-term nitrate-salt exposure.
method: Tribaloy-400 coatings were deposited on ASTM A516 steel by HVAF and detonation spraying.
Samples were exposed to 60% NaNO3–40% KNO3 molten solar salt at 500 °C for up to 1000 h.
Microstructure, phase formation, elemental mapping, mass gain, and spallation were compared.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports that HVAF retained a uniform Cr–Mo–Si–O enriched surface with minimal salt penetration after 1000 h, while DS showed deeper ingress, higher mass gain, and more spallation.
infographic.watch_item: Performance is demonstrated under one molten-salt composition and temperature, so coating selection may need revalidation for different CSP salts, thermal cycles, or service conditions.
infographic.paper_title: Hot corrosion behavior of thermal sprayed using HVAF and DS techniques with Tribaloy-400 coatings for solar energy storage container

zh-Hans.title: 采用HVAF和DS技术制备的Tribaloy-400涂层在太阳能储能容器中的热腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了采用两种热喷涂技术沉积在ASTM A516钢上的Tribaloy-400（T-400）涂层的高温腐蚀行为：(i) 高速空气燃料喷涂（HVAF）和 (ii) 爆炸喷涂（DS）。将涂层试样暴露于由60% NaNO3–40% KNO3组成的熔融太阳盐环境中，在500 °C下暴露最长达1000小时，以评估其抗氧化和耐腐蚀性能。相分析表明，两种涂层体系中均形成了稳定的保护性氧化物相，包括Cr2O3、Co3O4和CoMoO4。元素映射显示，即使在持续暴露1000小时后，HVAF涂层仍保持均匀的富Cr–Mo–Si–O表面，且熔盐渗透极少。相比之下，DS涂层表现出相对更深的盐向涂层微观结构内部侵入，这促进了更严重的劣化和剥落。SEM观察显示，HVAF涂层具有致密且结合良好的微观结构，同时形成了Cr2O3、CoCr2O4和CoMoO4等热力学稳定氧化物，从而对熔盐诱导腐蚀表现出更优异的抵抗能力。然而，DS涂层相对多孔的特性促进了盐辅助氧化物溶解，导致更高的质量增重、更严重的剥落以及在长时间暴露过程中更快的劣化。通过比较两种涂层技术，旨在为高温CSP应用确定合适的涂层工艺和供料组合。

infographic.key_insight: HVAF喷涂的Tribaloy-400形成的氧化膜比爆炸喷涂的T-400更致密、更具保护性，因此在500 °C下对熔融太阳盐腐蚀具有更好的抵抗能力。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于聚光太阳能热储能容器，在长期硝酸盐熔盐暴露条件下，HVAF T-400涂层似乎比DS涂层更耐久。
method: 采用HVAF和爆炸喷涂将Tribaloy-400涂层沉积在ASTM A516钢上。
试样在500 °C下暴露于60% NaNO3–40% KNO3熔融太阳盐中，最长达1000 h。
对微观结构、相形成、元素映射、质量增重和剥落进行了比较。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告指出，HVAF在1000 h后仍保持均匀的富Cr–Mo–Si–O表面且盐渗透极少，而DS则表现出更深的侵入、更高的质量增重和更多的剥落。
infographic.watch_item: 该性能仅在一种熔盐组成和温度下得到验证，因此针对不同的CSP熔盐、热循环或服役条件，可能需要重新验证涂层选择。

title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Changhao Yin, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Real-time weld-pool perception is critical for closed-loop control in laser wire-feed welding, where sensing, computation, and actuator response introduce unavoidable delay. This paper presents a physics-guided spatiotemporal state space network for lookahead weld-pool segmentation. The model uses historical coaxial grayscale images, welding process parameters, and aligned wire-state electrical signals to predict the future semantic layout of three physically meaningful regions: keyhole, wire, and molten pool. It combines a visual encoder, process- and sensor-conditioned feature normalization, patch-level temporal state space modeling, horizon-conditioned latent prediction, dense future feature prediction, and a motion-aware mask decoder. Auxiliary signed-distance-function supervision, temporal consistency, feature distillation, and fine-grained keyhole losses further constrain the predicted geometry and local motion. Experiments on a 43-sequence laser welding dataset show that the proposed WeldMamba reaches 74.63\% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead. Ablation studies further show that temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness are the main contributors to robust future segmentation.

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba predicts future weld-pool geometry from past images, process settings, and sensor signals to enable lookahead segmentation under control delay.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This supports closed-loop laser wire-feed welding by giving controllers an early view of keyhole, wire, and molten-pool regions before the actuator responds.
method: Physics-guided spatiotemporal state space network for future semantic layout prediction
Fuses coaxial grayscale history with welding parameters and wire-state electrical signals
Uses motion-aware decoding plus SDF, temporal consistency, distillation, and keyhole-specific losses
infographic.evidence_signal: On a 43-sequence laser welding dataset, the method achieved 74.63% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on synchronized historical imaging and sensor streams, so timing drift or domain shift in a new welding setup could reduce reliability.
infographic.paper_title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding

zh-Hans.title: 面向激光送丝焊接中前瞻熔池分割的物理引导时空状态空间建模
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光送丝焊接中，实时焊池感知对于闭环控制至关重要，因为传感、计算和执行器响应会引入不可避免的延迟。本文提出一种用于前瞻焊池分割的物理引导时空状态空间网络。该模型利用历史同轴灰度图像、焊接工艺参数以及对齐的丝材状态电信号，来预测三个具有物理意义区域的未来语义布局：小孔、丝材和熔池。该方法结合视觉编码器、由工艺和传感器条件约束的特征归一化、补丁级时间状态空间建模、时间跨度条件化潜在预测、密集未来特征预测以及运动感知掩码解码器。辅助的有符号距离函数监督、时间一致性、特征蒸馏和细粒度小孔损失进一步约束了预测的几何形状和局部运动。在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上的实验表明，所提出的WeldMamba在500 ms前瞻条件下达到了74.63%的mIoU。消融研究进一步表明，时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模以及小孔运动感知是实现鲁棒未来分割的主要贡献因素。

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba利用过去的图像、工艺设定和传感器信号预测未来焊池几何形状，从而在控制延迟条件下实现前瞻分割。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这通过在执行器响应之前为控制器提供小孔、丝材和熔池区域的早期视图，支持闭环激光送丝焊接。
method: 用于未来语义布局预测的物理引导时空状态空间网络
融合同轴灰度历史图像、焊接参数和丝材状态电信号
采用运动感知解码以及SDF、时间一致性、蒸馏和面向小孔的损失函数
infographic.evidence_signal: 在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上，该方法在500 ms前瞻条件下实现了74.63%的mIoU。
infographic.watch_item: 性能依赖于同步的历史成像和传感器流，因此在新的焊接设置中，时序漂移或域偏移可能会降低可靠性。

title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings
authors: Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, Aiym Nabioldina, Daryn Baizhan, Nurbol Berdimuratov, Gulsym Bektasova
abstract: This study investigates the influence of barrel filling ratio on the microstructure, phase composition, and tribological performance of detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings. Coatings were deposited at barrel filling ratios of 43% and 53% under identical spraying conditions. Microstructural characterization revealed the formation of dense lamellar coatings with low porosity and uniform distribution of Cr3C2 carbide particles within the NiCr metallic matrix. Compared with the coating deposited at a barrel filling ratio of 43%, the coating deposited at 53% exhibited a denser microstructure. X-ray diffraction analysis confirmed that Cr3C2 and NiCr remained the dominant phases after spraying, while a minor amount of Cr7C3 formed due to partial decarburization of chromium carbide during thermal exposure. Tribological performance was evaluated under dry sliding conditions using a ball-on-disc configuration at normal loads of 10 and 15 N and sliding speeds of 5 and 10 cm/s. Wear volume was determined from the geometry of the wear track after testing, and wear rate was calculated accordingly. The coating produced at a barrel filling ratio of 53% demonstrated improved wear resistance under elevated loads despite exhibiting a higher coefficient of friction. The minimum wear rate reached 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N), which was associated with reduced porosity and enhanced structural integrity of the coating. The obtained results demonstrate that optimization of detonation spraying parameters significantly affects coating structure and tribological behavior. The developed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings are promising protective materials for components operating under severe friction and wear conditions, including industrial and high-temperature engineering applications.

infographic.key_insight: Raising the barrel filling ratio from 43% to 53% made detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings denser and more wear-resistant, even though friction increased.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This suggests spray-parameter tuning can meaningfully improve carbide-based protective coatings for high-wear and high-temperature components.
method: Detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings at 43% and 53% barrel filling ratios under identical conditions.
Characterized microstructure and phase composition using microscopy and XRD.
Measured dry sliding tribology in ball-on-disc tests at 10 and 15 N and 5 and 10 cm/s.
infographic.evidence_signal: The 53% coating achieved the minimum wear rate of 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N) and showed reduced porosity versus the 43% coating.
infographic.watch_item: The study indicates a tradeoff: better wear resistance at 53% came with a higher coefficient of friction, so application-specific optimization is still needed.
infographic.paper_title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings

zh-Hans.title: 炸药喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层微观组织、相组成及摩擦学性能对炮筒填充比的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了炮筒填充比对炸药喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层微观组织、相组成及摩擦学性能的影响。在相同喷涂条件下，分别在43%和53%的炮筒填充比下制备涂层。微观组织表征显示，涂层形成了致密的层片状结构，孔隙率较低，Cr3C2碳化物颗粒在NiCr金属基体中分布均匀。与43%炮筒填充比下制备的涂层相比，53%下制备的涂层表现出更致密的微观组织。X射线衍射分析证实，喷涂后Cr3C2和NiCr仍为主导相，而由于热暴露过程中铬碳化物发生部分脱碳，形成了少量Cr7C3。摩擦学性能在干滑动条件下采用球-盘配置进行评估，法向载荷为10和15 N，滑动速度为5和10 cm/s。磨损体积根据测试后磨痕的几何形貌确定，并据此计算磨损率。53%炮筒填充比制备的涂层在较高载荷下表现出更好的耐磨性，尽管其摩擦系数更高。其最小磨损率达到1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N)，这与孔隙率降低和涂层结构完整性增强有关。所得结果表明，炸药喷涂参数的优化会显著影响涂层结构和摩擦学行为。所制备的Cr3C2–NiCr涂层是适用于严苛摩擦磨损条件下部件的有前景的防护材料，包括工业和高温工程应用。

infographic.key_insight: 将炮筒填充比从43%提高到53%可使炸药喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层更致密、耐磨性更高，尽管摩擦增大。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这表明喷涂参数调控能够显著提升碳化物基防护涂层在高磨损和高温部件中的性能。
method: 在相同条件下，于43%和53%炮筒填充比下制备炸药喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层。
采用显微镜和XRD对微观组织及相组成进行表征。
在10和15 N、5和10 cm/s条件下通过球-盘试验测量干滑动摩擦学性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 53%涂层获得了1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N)的最小磨损率，并且与43%涂层相比孔隙率更低。
infographic.watch_item: 该研究表明存在权衡：53%条件下更好的耐磨性伴随着更高的摩擦系数，因此仍需针对具体应用进行优化。

title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits
authors: Steven Camilleri, Thi Thuy Tien Tran, Keita Nomoto, Andrew Duguid, Matthew Harbidge, Riyan Rashid
abstract: Cold spray additive manufacturing (CSAM) is a solid-state process capable of producing dense metallic components without melting, making it highly attractive for copper applications requiring both electrical conductivity and mechanical integrity. In this study, the influence of spray pressure at 30 bar, 40 bar, 50 bar and 60 bar on particle velocity, microstructure, and properties of cold-sprayed copper was systematically investigated using a LightSPEE3D system. The cold spray deposits were characterised by X-ray diffraction (XRD), hardness testing, eddy current conductivity, tensile evaluation, and scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The results reveal that increasing spray pressure enhances particle velocities beyond the critical threshold for copper, leading to improved inter-particle bonding and microstructural refinement consistent with severe plastic deformation and possible continuous dynamic recrystallisation (cDRX)-assisted mechanisms. XRD analysis suggested progressive crystallite refinement and increased dislocation density with pressure, which directly correlated with improved ductility. While hardness decreased due to recovery and recrystallisation, electrical conductivity increased, likely due to improved inter-particle continuity and reduced interfacial discontinuities. Tensile testing showed a clear strength-ductility transition, with deposits at higher pressures exhibiting substantially improved ductility approaching bulk copper behaviour and fully ductile fracture morphologies. Overall, the findings identify an optimum processing window at higher spray pressures, where copper cold spray deposits achieve a balanced combination of conductivity, ductility, and strength. This study highlights the critical role of spray pressure in controlling the interplay between particle velocity, dynamic recrystallisation, and multifunctional performance in CSAM copper components. This study establishes a process-structure-property relationship linking particle velocity, XRD-derived microstructural evolution, conductivity, and tensile behaviour within a LightSPEE3D CSAM system.

infographic.key_insight: Raising cold-spray pressure from 30 to 60 bar increases copper particle velocity past the bonding threshold, producing denser deposits with better conductivity and ductility through stronger inter-particle bonding and recrystallization-related refinement.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For copper CSAM, spray pressure is a key control knob for tuning the trade-off between mechanical integrity and electrical performance in additively manufactured parts.
method: LightSPEE3D cold spray copper deposits were produced at 30, 40, 50, and 60 bar.
Microstructure and crystallite evolution were assessed with SEM and XRD.
Hardness, eddy current conductivity, and tensile testing quantified property changes.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports pressure-dependent improvements in particle velocity, conductivity, and ductility, with XRD indicating crystallite refinement and higher dislocation density at increased pressure.
infographic.watch_item: Higher pressure reduced hardness via recovery/recrystallization effects, so the optimum window must balance strength, ductility, and conductivity rather than maximize only one property.
infographic.paper_title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits

zh-Hans.title: 优化冷喷涂增材制造：压力驱动的铜沉积物机械性能提升
zh-Hans.abstract: 冷喷涂增材制造（CSAM）是一种无需熔化即可制备致密金属部件的固态工艺，因此在兼具电导率和机械完整性要求的铜应用中具有很高的吸引力。本研究系统考察了喷涂压力在30 bar、40 bar、50 bar和60 bar条件下对颗粒速度、显微组织和冷喷铜性能的影响，并采用LightSPEE3D系统进行制备。通过X射线衍射（XRD）、硬度测试、涡流电导率测试、拉伸评价和扫描电子显微镜（SEM）对冷喷沉积层进行了表征。结果表明，提高喷涂压力可使颗粒速度超过铜的临界阈值，从而增强颗粒间结合，并通过严重塑性变形以及可能由连续动态再结晶（cDRX）辅助的机制，实现显微组织细化。XRD分析表明，随着压力升高，晶粒尺寸逐步细化且位错密度增加，这与延展性改善直接相关。尽管由于回复和再结晶导致硬度下降，但电导率提高，这可能归因于颗粒间连续性改善以及界面不连续性减少。拉伸测试显示出清晰的强-韧转变，高压力下的沉积层表现出显著提升的延展性，接近块体铜行为，并呈现完全延性断裂形貌。总体而言，本研究确定了较高喷涂压力下的最佳工艺窗口，使铜冷喷沉积层能够实现导电性、延展性和强度的平衡组合。本研究强调了喷涂压力在控制颗粒速度、动态再结晶以及CSAM铜部件多功能性能之间相互作用中的关键作用。本研究建立了LightSPEE3D CSAM系统中颗粒速度、基于XRD的显微组织演化、电导率与拉伸行为之间的工艺-组织-性能关系。

infographic.key_insight: 将冷喷压力从30 bar提高到60 bar，可使铜颗粒速度超过结合阈值；通过更强的颗粒间结合以及与再结晶相关的细化作用，形成更致密、导电性更好且延展性更高的沉积层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于铜CSAM而言，喷涂压力是调控增材制造部件机械完整性与电性能权衡关系的关键控制参数。
method: 使用LightSPEE3D冷喷制备30、40、50和60 bar条件下的铜沉积层。
采用SEM和XRD评估显微组织与晶粒演化。
通过硬度、涡流电导率和拉伸测试量化性能变化。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了随压力升高而增强的颗粒速度、电导率和延展性，且XRD表明在更高压力下晶粒细化和位错密度增加。
infographic.watch_item: 较高压力会因回复/再结晶效应降低硬度，因此最佳窗口必须平衡强度、延展性和电导率，而不是只追求单一性能的最大化。

title: Spraying Polypyrrole Coatings on Alginate Nonwoven Fabrics and Investigating Their Conductive and Photothermal Properties
authors: Jiang Xu, S Liu, Wenjing Chen, Rui Wang, Longyun Hao
abstract: In this paper, a polypyrrole (PPy) dispersion was prepared by a chemical oxidative polymerization method, and then, the PPy coatings were constructed on alginate nonwoven fabrics (ANFs) via a direct spraying method. By FTIR, XPS, SEM, and EDS characterizations, it was confirmed that successful polymerization and homogeneous adhesion of PPy on ANFs occurred. The influences of Py dosage on the electrical conductivity, wettability, and photothermal conversion of the PPy-coated ANFs (PPy/ANFs) were investigated. Moreover, the solar-driven water evaporation performance of the PPy/ANFs was investigated, and it was found that with a Py dosage of 0.3 mol m –2, a water evaporation rate of 1.73 kg m –2 h –1 and a solar–thermal energy conversion efficiency of 93.54% under 1 sun could be achieved. Finally, the evaporation performance of the PPy/ANFs for water containing different colorants (dyes and pigments) was researched. For soluble dyes, cationic methylene blue (MB) had a weaker inhibition of water evaporation than anionic methyl orange (MO), mainly due to its stronger electrical attraction to ANFs. For insoluble PG7 pigment dispersed by different surfactants, the one stabilized by cationic DTAC had smaller adverse effects on the water evaporation rate of the PPy/ANFs. This could be attributed to its stronger electrostatic attraction to ANFs and larger particle size than those of SDS, thereby reducing the suppression of water evaporation. This study provided a facile strategy for fabricating flexible PPy-functionalized ANFs and offered insights into the efficient solar-driven treatment of water containing colorants.

infographic.key_insight: Direct spraying of polypyrrole onto alginate nonwoven fabrics creates a uniform conductive coating that also strongly boosts solar photothermal evaporation.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a simple, scalable surface-treatment route for flexible water-treatment textiles that combine conductivity, wettability control, and solar-driven desalination/dye remediation.
method: Chemically polymerize polypyrrole (PPy) dispersion.
Spray-coat PPy onto alginate nonwoven fabrics (ANFs).
Characterize coating chemistry/morphology and test conductivity, wettability, photothermal behavior, and evaporation performance.
infographic.evidence_signal: At a Py dosage of 0.3 mol m−2, the PPy/ANFs reached 1.73 kg m−2 h−1 evaporation rate and 93.54% solar-thermal conversion efficiency under 1 sun.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on colorant type and dispersion chemistry, so real wastewater mixtures may show reduced evaporation gains versus clean-water tests.

zh-Hans.title: 在海藻酸盐非织造布上喷涂聚吡咯涂层及其导电与光热性能研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 本文采用化学氧化聚合法制备了聚吡咯（PPy）分散液，随后通过直接喷涂法在海藻酸盐非织造布（ANFs）上构建PPy涂层。通过FTIR、XPS、SEM和EDS表征，证实PPy在ANFs上成功聚合并实现了均匀附着。研究了Py用量对PPy涂覆ANFs（PPy/ANFs）电导率、润湿性和光热转换性能的影响。此外，还考察了PPy/ANFs的太阳驱动水蒸发性能，结果表明，当Py用量为0.3 mol m−2时，在1 sun下可实现1.73 kg m−2 h−1的水蒸发速率和93.54%的太阳-热能转换效率。最后，研究了PPy/ANFs对含不同着色剂（染料和颜料）水体的蒸发性能。对于可溶性染料，阳离子亚甲蓝（MB）对水蒸发的抑制作用弱于阴离子甲基橙（MO），这主要归因于其与ANFs更强的静电吸引作用。对于由不同表面活性剂分散的不可溶PG7颜料，采用阳离子DTAC稳定的体系对PPy/ANFs水蒸发速率的不利影响更小。这可归因于其相较于SDS具有更强的与ANFs的静电吸引作用以及更大的粒径，从而降低了对水蒸发的抑制。本研究为制备柔性PPy功能化ANFs提供了一种简便策略，并为高效太阳驱动处理含着色剂水体提供了见解。

infographic.key_insight: 直接将聚吡咯喷涂到海藻酸盐非织造布上，可形成均一的导电涂层，并显著增强太阳光热蒸发性能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为柔性水处理纺织材料提供了一种简单、可规模化的表面处理路线，可同时实现导电性、润湿性调控以及太阳驱动海水淡化/染料去除。
method: 通过化学方法聚合制备聚吡咯（PPy）分散液。
将PPy喷涂覆于海藻酸盐非织造布（ANFs）上。
表征涂层化学组成/形貌，并测试电导率、润湿性、光热行为和蒸发性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 当Py用量为0.3 mol m−2时，PPy/ANFs在1 sun下实现了1.73 kg m−2 h−1的蒸发速率和93.54%的太阳-热转换效率。
infographic.watch_item: 性能取决于着色剂类型和分散体系化学性质，因此真实废水混合物中的蒸发增益可能低于清水测试结果。
